default.title: Something Exciting Is Coming
default.body: We're working on something special for you. Stay tuned — this page will be live very soon.
default.note: We'll let you know as soon as it's ready.

shop.title: Our Online Shop Is Coming
shop.body: Fresh sugarcane products, merchandise and more — all available to order online very soon.
shop.note: Drop us a message and we'll ping you when we launch.
